column1: # TopBand BMS Gateway - ESP32-S3 partition table (16 MB flash)
# Waveshare ESP32-S3 RS485/CAN Controller has 16 MB flash.
# ESP32 apps require 64 KB alignment. app0 starts at 0x20000 (next aligned
# boundary after otadata ends at 0x11000). Two 6 MB app slots give V3.0
# firmware generous headroom above the current V2.67.2 ~1.3 MB footprint.
# 3.8 MB LittleFS fits HTML/CSS/JS UI bundle
